subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-12 in Budapest to members of the Turanian Society
subcodes.first_line: I hope you may acquire a power that will enable you to effectively unite and harmonize the various peoples
subcodes.first_line_orig: امیدوارم قوه ا‌ی بیابید که بسبب آن در الفت و اتحاد نفوس مؤثر شوید و ترویج صلح
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @unity; oneness of humanity, @non-participation in politics
